channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Two Point Hospital: Full Health Collection announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
About

Transform an empty Two Point County hospital into the most beautiful—or functional—healthcare operation around! Cure strange illnesses, manage troublesome staff and build medical institutions so exciting that patients can’t wait to be rolled back in.

The First Entry in the Two Point Series

Two Point Hospital is the game that spawned the mayhem-filled Two Point Museum. As is the ordinary for Two Point titles, the residents of Two Point County are anything but normal. Treat their unusual ailments while expanding the operations of your very own hospital.

Loads of Content

Create the hospital of your dreams as you treat patients, design your facilities, and manage your staff!

A Complete Package Offering All the Downloadable Content

Two Point Hospital: Full Health Collection offers the base game and all of its downloadable content. Discover items from across the county, encounter patients with bizarre symptoms, and manage your own hospitals as they grow and flourish. Take your medical expertise to a variety of regions—immerse yourself in the supernatural, the arts and the occasional bit of time travel.

Full List of Content

  • Two Point Hospital
  • Culture Shock
  • Fancy Dress Pack
  • A Stitch in Time
  • Close Encounters
  • Retro Item Pack
  • Off The Grid
  • Speedy Recovery
  • Two Point Hospital Bonus Campus Items
  • Two Point Hospital: SEGA 60th Items
  • Two Point Hospital: Free Zombie Costume
  • Two Point Hospital: Hospital Pass (Golden Toilet)
  • Two Point Hospital: Jingle Jam (from Humble Bundle)
  • Two Point Hospital: Convention-al Rug (from Twitch, both Venus and Violet variants)

How to Play

Build up a Hospital from Nothing Your hospital starts completely empty.

Thankfully, there’s a wide range of items and facilities at your disposal—just what the doctor ordered. Setting up your Reception, Wards, and Pharmacies is key to running your hospital… And don’t forget the Toilets!

Take advantage of your available resources and soon your hospital will be thriving. Research new treatments, develop equipment, and satisfy your patients and staff to keep your business smooth sailing.

Hire Staff

Each part of the hospital needs Doctors, Nurses, Assistants and Janitors. Once you hire employees, be sure to maintain their Happiness by setting up Staff Rooms and fulfilling their Needs. If their morale falls too low, they might just quit. Or you could always just fire them yourself.

Take Care of Quirky Patients

Don’t expect Two Point County to be populated with your usual types of patients. In this world, you’ll experience all kinds of wacky illnesses. Don’t be surprised if a patient walks in with a case of Lightheadedness—a phenomenon that turns their head into a light bulb. Simply unscrew them and send them on their merry way.

Preparation is crucial. Diagnose illnesses, build the right rooms to handle them and hire qualified staff. Once in a while, there might be a pandemic afoot. As hospital administrator, you’ll have to be ready for ANY situation.

Earn Stars for Your Hospital

The Two Point Health Ministry awards stars to hospitals that fulfil each region’s needs. Each star earns you rewards, facility upgrades and new hospitals to build.

Manage Hospitals Under Challenging Conditions

Once a hospital is on track for success, you’ll unlock a new hospitals and regions. Each region comes with its own illnesses and a whole host of interesting symptoms. Do your best to take care of your patients and business as your organisation expands!

Watch the announcement trailer below.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/two-point-hospital-full-health-collection-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Captain Tsubasa II: World Fighters ‘Japan Youth Team vs. Thailand Youth Team’ gameplay
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

15 minutes of footage.

Publisher Bandai Namco and developer Tamsoft have released a 15-minute full match gameplay video of Captain Tsubasa II: World Fighters, featuring the Japan Youth and Thailand Youth teams.

Captain Tsubasa II: World Fighters is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam on August 27 in Japan and August 28 worldwide.

Watch the footage and an archive of today’s special broadcast below.

Full Match Gameplay: Japan Youth Team vs. Thailand Youth Team

English

Japanese

Release Date Decided Special Broadcast



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/captain-tsubasa-ii-world-fighters-japan-youth-team-vs-thailand-youth-team-gameplay
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Drunken Goddess Reflux launches in late 2026
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Between October and December.

Russian roulette drinking survival game Drunken Goddess Reflux will launch for PC via Steam in late 2026, between October and December, publisher and developer Alliance Arts, and developer WHO YOU announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Break the rules as you drink in this twisted game of Russian roulette, and push the demon till she spills it all!

“No one’s ever done this to me before…

Ahh, you’re incredible, darling.”

A shot glass Russian roulette with a demon who loves you enough to kill you.

Survive the night, and savor seven flavors of ruin.

The Drunker You Get, the Wilder the Game!

Drink until the rules stop mattering, and unleash drunken tricks only a true barfly could master to make it out alive!

A Soul-on-the-LINE Drinking Survival Game Where You Spill Your Soul or Make Her Spill!

A high-stakes roulette where every shot hits a little different!

Only one rule: get the demon wasted and make her spill her soul to win!

Femme Soule

“Surrender your life to me, darling. Let’s spend eternity together.”

In Hell’s bar, Pandemonium, a liquor-soaked demon awaits—one who loves you enough to kill you.

♥ Let’s sink into Hell side by side!

Longing for a sip of madness and bliss? Down for a one-night stand with a demon? Hallelujah! Add Drunken Goddess Reflux to your wishlist and wait for the release half-drunk and smiling!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Window Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/drunken-goddess-reflux-launches-in-late-2026
